issue: recent_vals/prior_vals filter is_not_None but doesn't enforce numeric. If rolling_corr payload contains string 'NaN' or other non-numeric, sum() raises TypeError. Currently no try wrapping this loop in _generate_alerts.

Analytics row is UPDATEd to COMPLETE before _generate_alerts is called. If _generate_alerts raises (e.g., transient Supabase error in dedup probe + DB-level retry), outer except runs _fail() which rewrites to FAILED. A successful analytics compute becomes a FAILED row due to a downstream alerting issue. Wrap _generate_alerts in try/except so a row never gets demoted from COMPLETE to FAILED.
